data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All ACs verified: Blast Radius added as Dimension 6, Step 2.5 procedure with stdin pipe to blast-radius-score.py, graceful degradation, complex_override forcing rule in Classification Rules, Five→Six-Dimension updates, optional blast_radius_score/blast_radius_signals in output schema, RED marker removed from .test-index. Also fixed pre-existing tools: field missing from frontmatter. All 14 tests pass (14 passed in 0.02s).
